title: 3D Medieval Iron Bars
description: Makes iron bars look great in medieval 3D style and a little bit changed coloring.
body:
Makes iron bars look **great** in medieval 3D style and a little bit changed coloring.

It _might_ say that the texture pack is for _older_ versions but it **still works**. If the texture pack **will** break, I will update it. **Probably** works on every older version, but I didn't check.

(for nerkin)
